details: Found sinh uses eltwise_sfpu.cpp compute kernel, SFPU_OP_CHAIN_0 expands to sinh_tile_init() and sinh_tile(0), math_approx_mode=false (default), no parameterization
Found sinh SFPU kernel in ckernel_sfpu_sinh.h. Uses calculate_sinh() with exp_21f helper, SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if). Two-path: full exp-based for |x|>=0.5, Taylor x+x^3/6 for |x|<0.5
ATANH uses eltwise_sfpu.cpp, SFPU_OP_CHAIN_0 expands to atanh_tile(0), no params, get_op_approx_mode returns false (default case)

Read ckernel_sfpu_atanh.h for both WH and BH - identical implementations. Uses SFPI abstractions: exexp, setexp, int32_to_float, vFloat arithmetic, Horner polynomial evaluation for ln(m). No branching on APPROXIMATION_MODE.

key_findings: Uses SFPI abstractions: exexp, setexp, int32_to_float, vFloat arithmetic. Computes atanh via ln decomposition with cubic minimax polynomial. WH and BH implementations identical.

details: All 4 abstraction layer file paths verified to exist. SFPU kernel style=A (SFPI abstractions). Key intrinsics: addexp(SFPDIVP2), exexp(SFPEXEXP), exman9(SFPEXMAN), int32_to_float(SFPCAST), setexp(SFPSETEXP), setsgn(SFPSETSGN), float_to_fp16b(SFP_STOCH_RND), vFloat arithmetic(SFPMAD). Parameters dispatch: VectorMode::RC, 4 faces, SETRWC between faces.

key_findings: Two kernel variants exist. tanhshrink_kernel.cpp uses FPU binary sub via binary_dest_reuse_tiles. tanhshrink_sfpu_kernel.cpp uses SFPU binary sub via sub_binary_tile.
